## Verification

- [ ] `npm test`
- [ ] `npm run check`
- [ ] `npm pack --dry-run` if package contents changed

## Safety

- [ ] No API keys, bearer tokens, user transcripts, or private logs committed
- [ ] Prompt payload logging remains opt-in
- [ ] Global Codex config changes remain explicit and reversible

## Scope

- [ ] Change stays focused on Codex + DeepSeek
- [ ] README/docs updated if behavior changed
